name: msm-archive-audit
description: Audits mainstream media archives to verify past predictions and core narratives against historical outcomes.

steps.name: archive-search
steps.prompt_template: Search Slovak and international mainstream media archives (SME, Pravda, Denník N, NYT, BBC) for predictions and core narratives regarding {{input}} from the specific historical period requested. Retrieve full article texts where available.

steps.name: cross-reference-narratives
steps.prompt_template: Analyze the retrieved media archives for {{input}}. Compare the published predictions against the verified outcomes provided in the current OSINT context. Identify narrative shifts, omissions, and successful forecasts. Focus on the accountability of specific outlets.
